series_metadata.series_description: Customer Survey, Individual Reemployment Plan, Attendance Sheet, Job Contacts, Resumes, and weekly list of customers (claimants) eligible for reemployment services. Unemployment Compensation Reemployment Services (UCRS) is program that provides early intervention reemployment assistance.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: in office ; Paper: in office 1 year and 4 years in Record Center
